message:
feat: port pow/sqrt/reciprocal and clamp/min/max ops across runtime stack (bd-3maf, bd-2qb0)

Add six new element-wise operations through all four crates:
- pow/sqrt/reciprocal as parameterized and unary ops with full autograd
- clamp as parameterized op (min/max bounds) with gradient passthrough
- min/max as binary ops with subgradient routing to the selected operand

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
